name: .data
summary: Define a named data table for data-driven sweeps (HSPICE)

parameters.name: datanm
parameters.description: Data-block name referenced by DATA=datanm on .DC / .AC / .TRAN.

parameters.name: pnam
parameters.description: Parameter column name (must be declared with .PARAM).

parameters.name: pval
parameters.description: Row of values; column count matches the parameter list.

dialectNotes: HSPICE supports inline .DATA … .ENDDATA blocks and external/MER file forms. Analysis statements select a block with DATA=datanm (optionally DATA=datanm(Nums)).
